featured_reads.issue: If homepage UI data is absent, it shows unavailable fallback even though article-index has public reads.
featured_reads.recommended_ag60g_action: Use clear curated-surface copy and optionally fallback to publicLatest while preserving curated hierarchy.

today_reading_guide.issue: If homepage UI data is absent, it shows unavailable fallback while article-index has public reads.
today_reading_guide.recommended_ag60g_action: Generate a source-backed guide from publicLatest when homepage UI data is absent.

indexed_reads.issue: Raw fallback copy still says alignment/activation even though source is available.
indexed_reads.recommended_ag60g_action: Update copy and preserve active publicLatest rendering.

browse_by_date.issue: publicByDate exists but the UI is not connected to it.
browse_by_date.recommended_ag60g_action: Connect date/theme UI to publicByDate/publicTopics or reword as prepared if not connected.

ag09c_single_featured_read.issue: Duplicates the main Featured Reads hierarchy and visually interrupts the reading surface.
ag09c_single_featured_read.recommended_ag60g_action: Rationalise: integrate into Featured Reads, rename as editorial sample, or remove after confirming source purpose.
